src/main/java/redis/embedded/AbstractRed.general_idea: Replace Guava's deprecated Lists.newArrayList() with standard Java LinkedList to remove external dependency and modernize code.
Introduce Lombok annotations to reduce boilerplate for constructors and getters.
Rename methods to use 'Instance' instead of 'Server' for consistent terminology.
Change constructor to accept a List of arguments instead of individual port integers.
Remove the 'ports' field as it is no longer used or exposed.
Update imports to reflect the removal of Guava and addition of Lombok.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/IRedisServe.general_idea: Change the return type of the ports method from List to Set to better represent a collection of unique port numbers.
Update imports to reflect the change from List to Set in the interface.
Standardize indentation of interface methods to use 4 spaces.

Replace imperative for-loops with parallel Stream API calls for starting and stopping servers.
Change return type of port collection methods from List to Set to ensure uniqueness.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisBunch..general_idea: Replace imperative for-loops with forEach and lambda expressions for collecting ports.
Remove unused import for ArrayList as it is no longer used in the class.
Add import for Set interface required by the new return types.
Add import for LinkedHashSet implementation required by the new return types.
Reorder imports to group java.util imports together and move specific package imports.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCliExe.general_idea: Add executable mappings for ARM64 architectures on Unix and macOS to support Apple Silicon and other ARM-based systems.
Replace the generic macOS executable constant with a specific AMD64 constant to align with the new architecture-specific mapping strategy.
Remove the mapping for 32-bit Unix x86 architecture, likely due to lack of support or availability of binaries in newer versions.
Remove the mapping for 32-bit macOS x86 architecture, consistent with the removal of 32-bit support.
Reorder class members to place the private constructor before the static factory method, following common Java coding conventions.

Remove large blocks of commented-out code that were likely legacy implementation details no longer needed.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisClient.human_impl: Removed ~100 lines of commented-out code including run(), stop(), and helper methods.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisClient.general_idea: Add a constructor to pass arguments to the new parent class.
Introduce a static builder factory method for easier instantiation.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.general_idea: Replace imperative for-loops with Java Stream API for isActive, start, and stop methods.
Invoke redisClient.run() during cluster start to ensure the client is active.
Rename servers() to nodes() to better reflect cluster terminology.
Rename serverPorts() to nodePorts() to align with the nodes() naming convention.
Change ports() return type from List<Integer> to Set<Integer> to prevent duplicates and use LinkedHashSet.

Add Set import to support the new return type of ports().
Add LinkedHashSet import to support the new implementation of ports().
Introduce Lombok annotations to reduce boilerplate code for logging and constructor generation.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.human_impl: Added @Slf4j and @NoArgsConstructor annotations to the class.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.general_idea: Replace the complex master-slave replication group model with a simpler flat node port set model for cluster configuration.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.human_impl: Replaced List<ReplicationGroup> and PortProvider logic with Set<Integer> nodePorts.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.general_idea: Introduce a dedicated builder for the Redis client to handle cluster-specific client configuration.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.human_impl: Added private RedisClientBuilder field and withClientBuilder method.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.general_idea: Allow configuration of the number of replicas per node in the cluster.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.general_idea: Simplify server construction by iterating directly over node ports and enabling cluster mode, removing master/slave distinction.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.human_impl: Replaced buildMaster/buildSlaves logic with a forEach loop over nodePorts calling serverBuilder.clusterEnable(true).

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.general_idea: Remove the deprecated API methods related to master-slave replication groups which are no longer supported in the new cluster model.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.human_impl: Removed methods serverPorts, ephemeralServers, ephemeral, and replicationGroup.
